creator: naito.yuichiro@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to heathn from comment #22)
Clang built Handbrake working fine is good news for me.
I was afraid of many clang warnings might break some feature.

I re-checked your research that multimedia/ffmpeg's patch
can be applied to Handbrake.
It is true and only the patch is needed for i386 arch.

I re-made "patch_clang_handbrake_107_2"
which changes to use clang
and includes the ffmpeg patch.

I tried to make it simple as I can,
and I expect this patch will be able to work for next release of Handbrake.

I tested this patch builds Handbrake successfully,
and the binary works on FreeBSD-11.1R amd64.
I checked i386 build succeeded, but I didn't run it.
Testing on i386 will take me more time.
If somebody run it on i386, please tell me.
